hero.headline: Master Trading.

features.title: Everything You Need to Trade Smarter

educate.title: World-Class Education
educate.description: Learn trading from A to Z with interactive courses, quizzes, and certifications — from basics to advanced strategies.

evaluate.title: Verified Broker Reviews
evaluate.description: Compare brokers rated by real traders. We verify every review and evaluate brokers based on transparency, withdrawals, and regulation.

recover.title: Fund Recovery Support
recover.description: Been cheated by a broker? Our legal experts contact brokers directly and use professional approaches to recover your lost funds.

certificates.title: Physical Certifications
certificates.description: Earn real, valuable certificates for completing courses — printed and shipped to your door worldwide.

community.title: Global Community
community.description: Join 3.72M+ traders sharing insights, broker experiences, and market analysis from around the world.

protection.title: Trader Protection
protection.description: We proactively blacklist fraudulent brokers and alert our community before they cause harm.

howItWorks.title: How PipsPlus Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Your journey from beginner to confident trader in three simple steps

step1.title: Learn the Fundamentals
step1.description: Start with free courses covering trading basics, market analysis, and risk management.

step2.title: Choose a Trusted Broker
step2.description: Use our verified broker ratings to find a transparent, regulated broker that fits your needs.

step3.title: Trade with Confidence
step3.description: Apply your knowledge, track your progress, earn certifications, and get support if needed.

fundRecovery.title: Fund Recovery Services
fundRecovery.subtitle: Lost funds to a dishonest broker? Our legal experts are here to help.

step1.title: Submit Your Case
step1.description: Tell us about your situation — which broker, how much was lost, and what happened.

step2.title: Case Review
step2.description: Our legal team reviews your case, gathers evidence, and assesses the best recovery strategy.

step3.title: Legal Action
step3.description: We contact the broker directly, escalate to regulators, and use professional legal channels.

step4.title: Fund Recovery
step4.description: We work until your funds are recovered or all legal avenues have been exhausted.

form.title: Submit Your Case
form.name: Full Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Please describe your situation in detail — when it happened, what the broker did, and any evidence you have...
form.success: Your case has been submitted. Our team will contact you within 24-48 hours.
form.disclaimer: All information is kept strictly confidential. We only pursue legally recoverable funds.

subscriptions.title: Choose Your Learning Path
subscriptions.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready for advanced courses and certification.

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect for beginners starting their trading journey.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: For serious traders who want the complete education and certification.

certificate.title: Real, Physical Certificates
certificate.description: Complete a course and earn a professionally printed certificate shipped to your door — verifiable by employers and institutions worldwide.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.
faq.q2: How do I get my physical certificate?
faq.a2: After completing a course, you'll be prompted to enter your shipping address. Certificates are printed and shipped within 5-7 business days.
faq.a3: All basic courses are permanently free. Premium subscribers get a 7-day free trial before being charged.
faq.q4: What languages are courses available in?
faq.a4: Courses are available in English, Arabic, Spanish, and French.
faq.a5: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.

about.title: About PipsPlus
about.subtitle: Empowering traders worldwide with knowledge, trust, and protection since 2018.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: PipsPlus was founded with a simple but powerful mission: protect traders from fraudulent brokers and empower them with world-class education. We believe every trader deserves transparent information, quality education, and a safety net when things go wrong.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We never take money from brokers to influence our ratings. Every review is independent.

education.title: Education First
education.description: We believe an educated trader is a protected trader. That's why basics are always free.

protection.title: Trader Protection
protection.description: From blacklisting fraudulent brokers to recovering lost funds, we put traders first.

community.title: Global Community
community.description: Our 3.72M+ trader community helps each other with real experiences and honest insights.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question or need support? Our team is here to help.
